flowcharts.title: Low-Grade Extracompartmental Appendicular Tumors, Grade I Axial Tumors, High-Grade (Grade II/III), Clear Cell, or Extracompartmental Chondrosarcoma

nodes.label: Adjuvant RT may be considered for positive margins or large extracompartmental tumors (category 2B). Radiation is not needed for negative margins [BONE-C 1 of 6].
Surgical excision of all sites if possible

edges.label: Adjuvant RT may be considered for positive margins or large extracompartmental tumors (category 2B). Radiation is not needed for negative margins [BONE-C 1 of 6].
Surgical excision of all sites if possible

nodes.label: Consider Ewing sarcoma regimens (category 2B) or doxorubicin-based regimens (doxorubicin alone or doxorubicin/ifosfamide/mesna) as adjuvant/neoadjuvant therapy [BONE-B 1 of 7].
